author: International Insurance Society
body:
What did being named an RGA Leader of Tomorrow mean to you?
It was a proud moment and endorsement of the work that I have been doing in the Life Insurance sector. I am thankful to my manager to have recognized the effort and recommending  me for this prestigious leadership group. This opens up new vistas in terms of learning from leaders across the globe and sharing  best practices and also showcased some of my work as well. This platform does create opportunities to further enhance your capability in terms of handling your role more effectively. It also keeps you updated on interesting developments happening across multiple geographies and explore opportunities for innovative ideas to be adopted in your market.

 

How did participating in the LOT program contribute to your career development?
The program helped in enhancing my career opportunities and being able to take on more responsibilities. It also helped me to look at the big picture of the work that I was doing and how I can contribute more for the betterment of the organization. It also helped in terms opening up new areas of work where I can contribute and make some difference.

images.alt: RGA Leaders of Tomorrow Spotlight: Mohit Rochlani, Director - Ops and IT, IndiaFirst Life Insurance Company Ltd
